basic_details.job_title: IUAC Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026: Apply Online for 10 Graduate, Diploma & ITI Apprentice Posts
basic_details.post_name: Graduate Apprentice, Diploma Apprentice, ITI Apprentice
basic_details.job_category: 1-Year Apprenticeship Training under the Apprentices Act, 1961
basic_details.short_information: IUAC Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026 notification has been released by the Inter-University Accelerator Centre (IUAC), New Delhi, inviting online applications for 1-year Apprenticeship Training under the Apprentices Act, 1961 (as amended). A total of 10 posts are available across Graduate, Diploma, and ITI Apprentice categories in disciplines such as Electronics, Instrumentation, Mechanical, Material Science and Technology, Machinist, Welder, and Electronic Mechanic. Eligible candidates who passed out in 2024, 2025, or 2026 can apply online at www.iuac.res.in/vacancies before the last date of

age_limit.details: Minimum age: 18 years Maximum age: 30 years as on the last date of submission of the application form

qualification.details: Graduate Apprentice (Electronics): Bachelor Degree in Engineering in Electronics/ Electronics and Communication/ Electronics and Telecommunication with minimum 55% marks. Graduate Apprentice (Instrumentation): Bachelor Degree in Engineering in Instrumentation/ Instrumentation & Control/ Electronics & Instrumentation/ Electrical & Instrumentation/ Electronics with minimum 55% marks. Graduate Apprentice (Mechanical): Bachelor Degree in Engineering in Mechanical/ Mechanical & Automation/ Mechanical & Automobile/ Production with minimum 55% marks. Graduate Apprentice (Material Science and Technology): Bachelor Degree in Science in Physics/ Applied Physics with minimum 55% marks. Diploma Apprentice (Mechanical): Diploma in Engineering in Mechanical/ Production/ Production & Industrial Manufacturing with minimum 55% marks. ITI Apprentice (Machinist): 2 years ITI certificate in Machinist/ Turner/ Grinder Trade with minimum 55% marks. ITI Apprentice (Welder): 1 year ITI certificate in Welder Trade with minimum 55% marks. ITI Apprentice (Electronic Mechanic): 2 years ITI certificate in Electronics Mechanic Trade with minimum 55% marks. | All qualifications must be from Indian Universities or Institutes recognized by appropriate statutory authorities. Candidates who passed out in 2024, 2025, or 2026 are eligible. Final-year appearing candidates can also apply but must furnish their final result/mark sheet at the time of selection. Candidates who have already undergone apprenticeship training or have job experience of one year or more after acquiring the required qualification are not eligible under the Apprentices Act, 1961.

salary_details.details: Graduate Apprentice (all disciplines): Rs. 12,300/- per month Diploma Apprentice (Mechanical): Rs. 10,900/- per month ITI Apprentice (Machinist & Electronic Mechanic): Rs. 10,560/- per month ITI Apprentice (Welder): Rs. 9,600/- per month | In addition to the stipend, all selected Apprentice Trainees will be provided medical facilities as per IUAC norms applicable to students.

selection_process: and selection will be made based on a merit list prepared as per the academic credentials of the candidates. Selected candidates will be informed through email and will be asked to submit scanned copies of their testimonials.
how_to_apply: Visit the official IUAC website: www.iuac.res.in
Find the link for Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026 (Advertisement No. 07/2026)
Fill in the online application form with accurate personal and educational details
Upload the required documents as specified in the application portal
Submit the application before the last date, 27 July 2026, 23:59 Hrs
Keep a copy/printout of the submitted application for future reference
important_instructions: This engagement as Apprenticeship Trainee is purely temporary and does not confer any right or claim for regular appointment at IUAC. All qualifications must be from Indian Universities or Institutes recognized by appropriate statutory authorities. Selection is based on the merit list as per academic credentials. Selected candidates will be informed only through the email ID provided in the application form; no other mode of communication will be used. If any information furnished by a candidate is found false, incomplete, or not in conformity with the eligibility criteria, the candidature will be revoked/terminated at any stage. Candidates must produce original certificates at the time of joining after document verification. IUAC reserves the right to not fill, increase, decrease, or cancel the advertised posts without assigning any reason, and its decision will be final. Applications received after the last date will be summarily rejected. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Corrigendum, if any, will be posted only on the official IUAC website. For queries, candidates can contact: [email protected] and [email protected]

rows.details: Graduate Apprentice, Diploma Apprentice, ITI Apprentice
1-Year Apprenticeship Training under the Apprentices Act, 1961

content_sections.heading: IUAC Apprentice Recruitment 2026: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Note: The official notification does not mention a separate application start date. Candidates are advised to check the IUAC website regularly for the latest updates.

content_sections.heading: IUAC Apprentice Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Graduate Apprentice (Electronics): Bachelor Degree in Engineering in Electronics/ Electronics and Communication/ Electronics and Telecommunication with minimum 55% marks. Graduate Apprentice (Instrumentation): Bachelor Degree in Engineering in Instrumentation/ Instrumentation & Control/ Electronics & Instrumentation/ Electrical & Instrumentation/ Electronics with minimum 55% marks. Graduate Apprentice (Mechanical): Bachelor Degree in Engineering in Mechanical/ Mechanical & Automation/ Mechanical & Automobile/ Production with minimum 55% marks. Graduate Apprentice (Material Science and Technology): Bachelor Degree in Science in Physics/ Applied Physics with minimum 55% marks. Diploma Apprentice (Mechanical): Diploma in Engineering in Mechanical/ Production/ Production & Industrial Manufacturing with minimum 55% marks. ITI Apprentice (Machinist): 2 years ITI certificate in Machinist/ Turner/ Grinder Trade with minimum 55% marks. ITI Apprentice (Welder): 1 year ITI certificate in Welder Trade with minimum 55% marks. ITI Apprentice (Electronic Mechanic): 2 years ITI certificate in Electronics Mechanic Trade with minimum 55% marks. All qualifications must be from Indian Universities or Institutes recognized by appropriate statutory authorities. Candidates who passed out in 2024, 2025, or 2026 are eligible. Final-year appearing candidates can also apply but must furnish their final result/mark sheet at the time of selection. Candidates who have already undergone apprenticeship training or have job experience of one year or more after acquiring the required qualification are not eligible under the Apprentices Act, 1961.

content_sections.heading: IUAC Apprentice Recruitment 2026: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum age: 18 years Maximum age: 30 years as on the last date of submission of the application form

content_sections.heading: IUAC Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026: Salary/Stipend
content_sections.text: Graduate Apprentice (all disciplines): Rs. 12,300/- per month Diploma Apprentice (Mechanical): Rs. 10,900/- per month ITI Apprentice (Machinist & Electronic Mechanic): Rs. 10,560/- per month ITI Apprentice (Welder): Rs. 9,600/- per month In addition to the stipend, all selected Apprentice Trainees will be provided medical facilities as per IUAC norms applicable to students.

content_sections.heading: IUAC Apprentice Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Applications received will be scrutinized, and selection will be made based on a merit list prepared as per the academic credentials of the candidates. Selected candidates will be informed through email and will be asked to submit scanned copies of their testimonials.

content_sections.heading: IUAC Apprentice Recruitment 2026: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Based on the official notification, candidates should be ready with: Scanned copies of educational testimonials/certificates (as requested after selection) Final year mark sheet/result, if appearing in final year Original certificates for verification at the time of joining

content_sections.heading: IUAC Apprentice Recruitment 2026: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: This engagement as Apprenticeship Trainee is purely temporary and does not confer any right or claim for regular appointment at IUAC. All qualifications must be from Indian Universities or Institutes recognized by appropriate statutory authorities. Selection is based on the merit list as per academic credentials. Selected candidates will be informed only through the email ID provided in the application form; no other mode of communication will be used. If any information furnished by a candidate is found false, incomplete, or not in conformity with the eligibility criteria, the candidature will be revoked/terminated at any stage. Candidates must produce original certificates at the time of joining after document verification. IUAC reserves the right to not fill, increase, decrease, or cancel the advertised posts without assigning any reason, and its decision will be final. Applications received after the last date will be summarily rejected. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Corrigendum, if any, will be posted only on the official IUAC website. For queries, candidates can contact: [email protected] and [email protected]

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IUAC Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 27 July 2026, up to 23:59 Hrs.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IUAC Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 10 vacancies are available across Graduate, Diploma, and ITI Apprentice categories.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for IUAC Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be at least 18 years old, with an upper age limit of 30 years as on the last date of application submission. Age relaxation of 5 years applies for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and 10 years for Persons with Disability.

faq.question: Q4. What is the stipend for IUAC Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: The stipend ranges from Rs. 9,600/- to Rs. 12,300/- per month, depending on the apprenticeship category and post.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for IUAC Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the vacancies section of the official IUAC website at www.iuac.res.in/vacancies.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for IUAC Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee. Candidates should verify this on the official website before applying.
